Elite_Plan_Features: Permanent showcase slot • Unlimited display time • Advanced priority
Pro_Business_Plan_Features: One showcase slot × 50 hours/week • Buy extra hours when needed
account_banned: Your account has been banned from creating invitations.

account_long_banned: Your account has been banned from creating invitations for an extended period.

admin_delete_user_storage: Storage cleanup ran for {{count}} path prefix(es).

Sync completed!

affiliate_auth_err_profile_fields: Please complete all contact and payout fields.

affiliate_copy_failed: Could not copy. Select the link and copy manually.

affiliate_dash_payout_incomplete: Add a valid PayPal email, full mailing address, and city & country in Settings to be payout-ready.
affiliate_dash_payout_sub: PayPal and your address are required before withdrawals can be processed. You can edit them anytime.
affiliate_dashboard_sub: Track your reach and share your personal invite link.
affiliate_link_backend_hint: Your invite link is created automatically when your partner account is active. If the code is missing, wait a few seconds and refresh — the server assigns a unique code.
affiliate_link_not_ready: Your referral link is still being generated. Try again in a moment.
affiliate_login_intro: Email and password only — no social login on this page.
affiliate_login_not_agent: This login is only for affiliate partners. Use the main app login for personal or business accounts.
affiliate_marketing_body: Share this URL anywhere you promote DineBuddies. Clicks are counted when someone opens your link.

affiliate_verify_banner_body: Confirm your email to view your referral link, share it, and request payouts.

affiliate_verify_to_share: Verify your email to use your referral link.

auth_error_fallback: Something went wrong. Please try again.

auth_in_app_browser_hint: Please open dinebuddies.com in Safari or Chrome to use this login.

auth_invalid_verification_code: Invalid or expired code. Request a new one.

auth_operation_not_allowed: This sign-in method is not enabled.
auth_password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters.

auth_personal_portal_only: This account must sign in with Google, Facebook, or Apple on the personal login page.

auth_reset_failed: Could not send reset email. Try again later.
auth_too_many_requests: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
auth_unavailable: Service temporarily unavailable. Try again in a moment.

data_security_text: We use modern encryption technologies to protect your data. However, no security system is 100% secure.

faq.title: Help & Support
faq.subtitle: Find answers to your questions and learn how to get the most out of DineBuddies.

user_questions.a: The ultimate platform for food lovers! DineBuddies is an innovative social app blending fine dining discovery, meeting new people through curated food invitations, and building genuine tabletop communities.

user_questions.q: How do I create an invitation and split the bill?
user_questions.a: Tap the (+) button, select a restaurant, and set your date & time. In the settings, you can choose if the bill is 'On the Host', 'Split Equally', or 'Everyone pays for themselves'.

user_questions.q: What's the difference between Public, Private, and Dating invitations?
user_questions.a:
• Public: Visible on the main map for anyone to request joining.
• Private: A hidden invitation sent exclusively via an elegant e-invite link to specific people.
• Dating: Specially curated romantic encounters requiring a Premium subscription, featuring advanced filters and trusted reviews.

user_questions.q: How do I accept join requests for my invitation?
user_questions.a: When someone requests to join, you receive an instant notification. Open the invitation details, review their profile, and tap 'Accept' or 'Decline'. Once accepted, a private group chat automatically unlocks.

Every restaurant on the app has its own 'Community'. By joining a restaurant's community, you enter a public chat room with the staff and other patrons to ask about dishes, share recommendations, and catch exclusive offers.

user_questions.q: How do I level up my account and earn Reputation Points?
user_questions.a: Reputation Points show your reliability! They increase when you attend events on time and receive 5-star ratings from hosts or guests. Points drop if you no-show or receive complaints.

user_questions.q: How do I upgrade to Premium (VIP)?
user_questions.a: Navigate to your Profile > Settings > Subscriptions. The VIP tier grants you exceptional search filters, full access to Dating invitations, profile visitor insights, and unlimited private invites.

user_questions.q: How do I permanently delete my account?
user_questions.a: Go to Profile > Settings > Account > Delete Account. Please note that this action is permanent and data cannot be restored after 30 days.

user_questions.q: How do I filter restaurants and cafes?
user_questions.a: Use the search bar and filter toggles to sort by Restaurants, Cafes, currently Open venues, or rank them by Highest Rating and closest Distance.
Instead of waiting for app users, create a 'Private' invitation, copy its elegant electronic card link, and share it via WhatsApp! Anyone clicking the link is seamlessly guided to RSVP with you.

business_questions.q: What is the Business Pro Dashboard?
business_questions.a: A tailored, professional control center for DineBuddies restaurant partners. It gives you full control over your Menu, operating hours, direct chats, and broadcasting marketing posts across the platform.

business_questions.q: How do I publish a Featured promotional post?
business_questions.a: From the Pro Dashboard, navigate to 'Featured Posts', upload your promotional image, and write a caption. Your post will instantly appear to all users in the main app feed.

business_questions.q: How do I broadcast offers to my community?
business_questions.a: Every user who joins your 'Community' shows up in your Members tab. You can drop massive discounts directly into the 'Community Chat' to instantly drive traffic during off-peak hours.

business_questions.q: How do I manage my digital Menu?
business_questions.a: Under 'Menu & Services' in your dashboard, upload dishes with mouth-watering photos and pricing. The sleek digital menu updates instantly for all profile visitors.

business_questions.q: What is the difference between Professional and Elite Partner tiers?
business_questions.a: The 'Pro' tier sets up your storefront and directory listing. The 'Elite' tier is our powerhouse package, supercharging your algorithm ranking and granting unlimited, priority Featured Slides for maximum visibility.

business_questions.q: How do I handle Customer Reviews?
business_questions.a: The 'Reviews' tab provides deep analytical breakdowns of your ratings. You also have the power to officially reply to reviews under your restaurant’s verified name to build lasting customer loyalty.

faq.subtitle: Find answers to your questions and learn how to get the most out of DineBuddies.
faq.title: Help & Support
faq_create_answer: You can create a new invitation by clicking the (+) button in the bottom menu, then choosing the venue and setting the time and number of guests.
faq_create_invitation: How do I create a new invitation?
faq_delete_account: How do I delete my account?
faq_delete_answer: You can delete your account from the settings page in your profile, or contact technical support.
faq_description: Find answers to common questions or contact us directly.
faq_free_answer: Yes, the app is free for basic use. You can subscribe to premium plans for additional features.
faq_reputation_answer: Reputation points are a measure of your credibility in the app. They increase when you commit to invitations and others rate you positively, and decrease with frequent absences.

feedback_empty_desc: You haven't received any new open complaints or suggestions.

feedback_success: Your message has been sent successfully. We will contact you soon.

magic_cover_applied_toast: AI cover applied to this invitation.
magic_cover_apply_explain: Apply updates the title, message, colors, font, motion, and cover image on this draft. You can still edit everything afterward.
magic_cover_aspect_hint: 1:1 (square) or 9:16 (vertical) — matches the hero layouts in the card preview below.
magic_cover_cta_subline: Optional — you can publish with a normal photo. Paid: about {{cost}} credits per successful generation. Choose aspect ratio, add notes, generate, then apply only if you want it.
magic_cover_cta_subline_generic: Optional — you can publish with a normal photo. Credits are charged per successful generation on the server.
magic_cover_discard_credits_note: Discarding does not refund credits — they were already charged when generation succeeded.
magic_cover_empty_brief_fallback: No extra host notes. Infer a short inviting title and message from the stated vibe, venue type, and place.
magic_cover_fab_title: Optional AI cover — paid; tap to open
magic_cover_generated_review: Cover generated. Review the preview, then apply to your invitation when ready.
ai_gemini_billing_exhausted: Dine Credits in the app are separate from Google AI Prepay. Google returned “prepayment credits depleted” for Firebase project dinebuddies — top up Prepay in AI Studio (ai.studio/projects → dinebuddies → Billing), not the in-app wallet.
ai_malformed_response: Could not read the AI response. Try again with a shorter prompt.
ai_image_generation_failed: Image generation failed. Try a different description or check Imagen settings on the server.
magic_cover_inline_hint: Optional paid AI cover — tap the wand to open.
magic_cover_optional_intro: You do not need AI to publish. Keep a normal photo or venue image from the media section — this tool is only if you want an auto-styled cover and suggested text.
magic_cover_paid_notice: Paid add-on: about {{cost}} credits per successful generation. Credits are deducted as soon as generation succeeds, even if you close this panel without applying the result to your invitation.
magic_cover_paid_notice_generic: Paid add-on: credits are charged per successful generation on the server. The exact amount depends on your account and promotions.
magic_cover_reference_error: Could not use this image. Try a smaller file or another format.
magic_cover_reference_hint: Optional: attach a photo for Gemini to match mood, colors, or setting. The generated cover stays text-free and original.
magic_cover_reference_invalid: Please choose an image file (JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF).
magic_cover_requires_venue: Choose a venue from search above to enable Generate Magic Cover.
magic_cover_sign_in_to_scroll: Sign in to use Magic cover in the section above.
magic_cover_moderation_failed: The generated image did not pass moderation. Credits were refunded if the server could not complete the request.
ai_cover_storage_not_ready: The image is not available in storage yet. Wait a few seconds and try generating again.
ai_request_timeout: Image generation timed out. The server may still be working — wait and try again.
manage_business: You can manage your business from the profile page
maps_key_missing_user_hint: Place search uses OpenStreetMap (Photon + Nominatim) and does not require a Google Maps API key.
maps_places_quota_hint: Google Places quota exceeded. Try again later or check usage and billing in Google Cloud Console.
maps_places_request_denied_hint: Google blocked place search (REQUEST_DENIED). In Google Cloud Console: enable the legacy Places API (not only Places API New) for this project, add your site under HTTP referrer restrictions on the key, and ensure billing is active. The in-app search uses the classic Maps JavaScript Places library.
maps_script_failed_user_hint: Google Maps could not load on this domain. In Google Cloud Console, add your live site URLs to the API key HTTP referrer list, and enable Maps JavaScript API plus the legacy Places API (and Geocoding API if you use city bounds).
media_ai_tab_hint: Generate a text-free hero plus title, message, and theme with Magic cover. We scroll you to the studio above.

private_magic_variant_lane_b: Vertical 9:16 mobile hero — stylish night-out energy, tasteful neon accents, premium nightlife mood, no text.
private_magic_variant_lane_c: Vertical 9:16 mobile hero — fresh airy daytime brunch or patio, botanical hints, natural soft light, no text.

private_section_media_hint: Upload your own image or video for the invitation. You can publish without using AI.
private_section_templates_hint: Pick a background style for your occasion. This is separate from the cover photo or video below.

seo.title: DineBuddies | Premium Social Dining & Exclusive Food Network
seo.description: DineBuddies is an exclusive social dining network where food lovers meet, join private restaurant invitations, and connect over premium meals.
DineBuddies is an exclusive social dining network where food lovers meet, join private restaurant invitations, and connect over premium meals.
seo.title: DineBuddies | Premium Social Dining
share_limit_recipient: You have already shared this item with the same recipient today.
share_limit_total: You have reached the maximum (3 times) for sharing this item today.
sharing_info_text: We do not sell your personal data to any third party. We may share some general data (without identity) with partners to improve services.
show_email_desc: Display your email on your profile
show_location_desc: Display your location on your profile
sign_out_failed: Could not sign out. Try again.
smart_bio_disclaimer: This uses your form fields only (no cloud AI). Uncheck items you do not want in the message.
smart_bio_disclaimer_ai: Options below control which details are sent to the AI. The button requests 10 short headlines from the server (Gemini); no key is stored in the app.
smart_bio_suggestions_hint: Tap a line to use it as your message (you can edit it after).
something_went_wrong: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again
start_conversation_first: Be the first to start the conversation
story_interaction_hint_private: Your reply is private between you and the story owner
story_owner_hint: This is your story. Open comments to see audience reactions.
story_owner_privacy_note: Only you can see these replies
story_viewer_privacy_note: Visible only to you and the story owner
suggest_messages_failed: Could not load suggestions. Try again in a moment.
suggest_messages_internal: The AI suggestion service failed (often a Gemini API key, quota, or model issue on the server). Try again later or write the message yourself.
suggest_messages_invalid_context: Add a title and location so we can suggest a message.
suggest_messages_not_configured: Message suggestions are not configured on the server (missing API key).
suspend_account: Management reserves the right to suspend any account that violates ethical standards.
terms_agreement: By continuing, you agree to our Terms and Conditions and Privacy Policy
terms_intro_text: Welcome to DineBuddies app. By using this app, you agree to comply with these terms and conditions. If you do not agree with any part of them, you may not use the app.
time_change_confirm:
⚠️ Important Notice:

This will:
1. Change the time from {{oldDate}} {{oldTime}} to {{newDate}} {{newTime}}
2. Send notification to all participants ({{count}} people)
3. Change their status from "Accepted" to "Pending"

Are you sure?
time_change_notification: The time for "{{title}}" has been changed from {{oldDate}} {{oldTime}} to {{newDate}} {{newTime}}. Please confirm your attendance again.
time_change_success:
✅ Time changed successfully!

Notifications sent to {{count}} participants.
time_change_warning: ⚠️ The organizer changed the time. Does the new time work for you?
